chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4991 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on CMA No.243/2025 2.For order on CMA No.244/2025 3.For hearing on CMA No.22186/2024 4.For hearing of main case. 10.02.2025 Mr.Irfan Yaqoob Arfani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. This petition seeking following relief:- “(a) To restrained the Respondent No.02 to 05, not to allot or transfer or adjust the said reserve piece of Asaish land measuring 07 acres in violation of Government of Sindh, Land Utilization Department Notification No.B-SB-III/I-279-P/1704/89 Hyderabad dated 04.12.1989 and notification passed by the Respondent No.03 bearing No.DC/K/Malir/489/2012 dated 01.02.2012. (b) To direct the Respondent No.02 to 05, not to change or alter the status of land for Asaish within measurement of 20 (twenty) chains adjacent to the west of Yousuf Arfani Goth in violation of clause 13 of Government of Sindh, Land Utilization Department notification No.SB-III/I-279- P/1704/89 Hyderabad dated 04.12.1989 and notification passed by Respondent No.03 bearing No.DC/K/Malir/489/2012 dated 01.02.2012. (c) To declare that the act of harassment under the pretense of land grabbers/Respondent No.08 by Respondent No.06 & 07 are unlawful and liable to be prohibited. (d) To direct the official respondent, to act in accordance with law and to provide protection to the life and property of village people of Yousuf Arfani Village as envisaged under the articles of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan.” Prima facie it is apparent that the subject controversy is in respect of title / right in respect of immoveable property, which may not be determined without recourse of inquiry / investigation / evidence etc.

Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. This petition seeking following relief:- “(a) To restrained the Respondent No.02 to 05, not to allot or transfer or adjust the said reserve piece of Asaish land measuring 07 acres in violation of Government of Sindh, Land Utilization Department Notification No.B-SB-III/I-279-P/1704/89 Hyderabad dated 04.12.1989 and notification passed by the Respondent No.03 bearing No.DC/K/Malir/489/2012 dated 01.02.2012. (b) To direct the Respondent No.02 to 05, not to change or alter the status of land for Asaish within measurement of 20 (twenty) chains adjacent to the west of Yousuf Arfani Goth in violation of clause 13 of Government of Sindh, Land Utilization Department notification No.SB-III/I-279- P/1704/89 Hyderabad dated 04.12.1989 and notification passed by Respondent No.03 bearing No.DC/K/Malir/489/2012 dated 01.02.2012. (c) To declare that the act of harassment under the pretense of land grabbers/Respondent No.08 by Respondent No.06 & 07 are unlawful and liable to be prohibited. (d) To direct the official respondent, to act in accordance with law and to provide protection to the life and property of village people of Yousuf Arfani Village as envisaged under the articles of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan.” Prima facie it is apparent that the subject controversy is in respect of title / right in respect of immoveable property, which may not be determined without recourse of inquiry / investigation / evidence etc. Learned counsel for the petitioner has also not been able to articulate as to the locus standi of the petitioner to seek said relief. Petition being mis-conceived is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
